description: Split screen showing the same location with two different map styles (dark vs light) representing before/after states. Best for war damage, urban development, border changes, infrastructure before and after an event.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'MARIUPOL: BEFORE & AFTER' or 'URBAN TRANSFORMATION'
fields.MAP_LABEL_1: City key (uppercase): LOS_ANGELES, NEW_YORK, LONDON, DUBAI, TOKYO, KYIV, GAZA, ALEPPO, BEIRUT, MARIUPOL
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary comparing the two states, e.g. 'Population dropped by 81% following the siege'
